creator: root@dhclient2.tnd.lab.arcor.de
text:
csup reproducably fails when trying to update from 6.2-RELERASE to RELENG-6.2
	( cvsup on the same machine and source tree against the same server works fine )

	error message: 

 	Edit ports/Mk/bsd.java.mk
 	 Add delta 1.74 2007.01.22.21.49.51 glewis
 	 Add delta 1.75 2007.01.31.14.07.24 pav
	Updater failed: Bad diff from server

Fix: 

none
How-To-Repeat: 
	- install 6.2-RELEASE
	- run csup with a supfile for RELENG-6.2
